name: wmkf_app_request_person
description: Junction tracking PI / co-PI participation across akoya_request history. One row per (request, contact, role). Replaces the legacy 6-OR query against akoya_request._wmkf_projectleader_value + _wmkf_copi1..5_value. Backfilled once from existing slot fields; ongoing sync is owned by Connor's net-new PA flows on akoya_request create/update. Read-side strategy is UNION with akoya_request._wmkf_projectleader_value (NOT junction-first/fallback) — see docs/REVIEWER_POSTGRES_TO_DATAVERSE_PLAN.md §5.

primaryNameAttribute.description: Synthetic primary name (request number + role + position) for picker display.

attributes.description: PI or co-PI. AO/Liaison are account-level (pilot scope) and not in this junction; reviewers stay on wmkf_potentialreviewer.
Provenance from legacy slot fields: 0 for PI (from _wmkf_projectleader_value), 1–5 for co-PI (from _wmkf_copi1..5_value). Optional; PA-flow-created rows may leave this null.

relationships.lookupDescription: The proposal this person is associated with.
The person playing the PI/co-PI role.
